answers: Unemployment occurs when people who are actively seeking work cannot find jobs. It's measured as the unemployment rate, which is the percentage of the labor force without work.
Unemployment holo jokhon manush kaj khuje but pay na. Eta economy te boro problem - income nei, mental stress hoy, ar overall economy te impact pore.
Causes of unemployment include economic recession, automation, outsourcing, seasonal changes, skill mismatch, and structural changes in the economy.
To deal with unemployment, upskill yourself through online courses, network actively, consider freelancing or gig work, update your resume, and explore different industries.
